# CWE-549: password never returned in responses or logs.
lang: go
file: CWE-549-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func PreviewSignup(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	_ = db
	_ = c.PostForm("password")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"email": c.PostForm("email"),
	})
}
